title: Phase 0: Data model and API specs documentation
description: Create comprehensive DATA-MODEL.md documenting all entities, fields, relationships, and lifecycle states. Create API-SPECS.md documenting all route groups, request/response shapes, auth requirements, and side effects.
steps: Write docs/DATA-MODEL.md with all entities from PRD (platform core + business models)
Document all fields, types, constraints, and relationships
Document entity lifecycle states and valid transitions
Write docs/API-SPECS.md with all route groups organized by module
Document request/response shapes, auth requirements, rate limits, and side effects for each route
